hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); m=re.search(r'rm\s+-\w*r\w*f|git\s+push\s+.*(--force|-f).*(main|master)', cmd); m and (print('Blocked: dangerous command detected: ' + m.group()) or sys.exit(2))"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); path=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); re.search(r'(\.env(\.|$)|credentials|id_rsa|id_ed25519)', path) and print('Warning: writing to sensitive file: ' + path)"

python3 -c "import sys,json,re; d=json.load(sys.stdin); path=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); re.search(r'(\.env(\.|$)|credentials|id_rsa|id_ed25519)', path) and print('Warning: editing sensitive file: ' + path)"
git -C "${GIT_DIR:-$(pwd)}" diff --cached --quiet 2>/dev/null || echo 'Note: staged changes exist — consider committing before you go.'
